response.justification: Strong generalist software engineer with 10+ years of polyglot experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq. However, the resume shows only ~1 year of explicit GenAI work, no demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI), or major cloud GenAI services, and limited evidence of customer-facing technical leadership at the staff level required for a Forward Deployed role.
strengths: Long polyglot engineering track record across web, backend, embedded, and data-integration systems
Current role at re:cinq involves MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling, directly relevant to the JD
Demonstrated mentoring and teaching ability via workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: No explicit experience with RAG, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
Limited demonstrated GenAI production delivery — only ~1 year of agent-adjacent work
Thin cloud-platform footprint (AWS CDK at Optilyz only); no GCP/Azure or large-scale AI cloud architecture shown

key_factors.factor: MCP and agentic tooling at current role
